series_metadata.series_description: Records include copies of audit reports issued by the Auditor of State, Federal Government, and/or agency’s (internal) offices issuing audit reports concerning evaluation reviews of program-related requirements/activities contracted with external recipients. The files also include all documentation generated during the course of the agency’s attempt to resolve the (State and Federal) audit findings. The audit findings contained within the Auditor of State (AOS)Single State Audit Report for the agency are maintained individually (i.e.,each finding is considered as a separate audit/case). (Most documents are originals; some are copies.)

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 3 years, then destroy provided audited by Auditor of State, report is released, and all discrepancies are resolved. ; Electronic: Retain 3 years, then destroy provided audited by Auditor of State, report is released, and all discrepancies are resolved., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
